lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. It has been well-maintained, with minor cosmetic wear consistent with regular use. All mechanical systems are currently in proper working order.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, minor dents, and some paint fading on the hood and roof. Inside, the upholstery shows significant wear and a few small tears, and while all major electronics function, some plastic trim pieces are loose or missing. Mechanically, the car runs and drives well, but it will likely need suspension work and a brake service in the near future. It’s a solid choice for someone looking for affordable transportation who doesn't mind a bit of character and some upcoming DIY projects.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in a state of uncompromising excellence, having been maintained to the highest standards of aesthetic and mechanical integrity. Its concours-level finish and pristine interior appointments reflect a history of meticulous stewardship. For the discerning individual seeking a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned market, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly distinguished asset.

Hey there! 👋 I’m honestly a little sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every service. If you’re looking for something that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, you’ve found it! It’s been garage-kept and loved, and I can't wait for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

Presenting a collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine Laguna Seca Blue. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies with a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission offers precise gate engagement, paired with a factory M-Variable Differential Lock for optimal mechanical grip. This vehicle is mechanically superlative: the dual-VANOS system has been professionally overhauled, and the rear subframe has undergone proactive reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity. The suspension geometry remains true, and the ventilated compound rotors provide fade-free deceleration. Inside, the Nappa leather bolsters show zero compression, reflecting its meticulous curation. This is an investment-quality icon for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Clean title. No accidents. Garage kept. Fully inspected.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in showroom condition that must be seen to be fully appreciated. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with zero swirl marks, rock chips, or imperfections, having been meticulously garage-kept and protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine, factory-fresh state; the premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear or creasing, and the interior is completely free of any odors or blemishes. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive, documented service history with every maintenance interval performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships. Every button, switch, and feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. All original accessories, including both key fobs, the owner’s manual, and the original window sticker, are included. This is an investment-grade example for a discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an interior and exterior devoid of discernible wear. Every mechanical and aesthetic component has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our highest benchmarks for performance and preservation. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than the pinnacle of vehicle quality, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine machine.

Hey there! You are going to absolutely love this ride. It’s in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve been super meticulous with its upkeep, so there isn’t a scratch or dent to be found, and the interior is still looking spotless. It drives like an absolute dream, and I'm honestly a little sad to see it go. If you're looking for a car that’s been pampered and is ready for many more miles of fun, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This 1993 Mazda RX-7 (FD) is a benchmark example of 90s JDM engineering, maintained to a collector-grade standard. Under the hood, the sequential twin-turbocharged 13B-REW rotary engine pulls flawlessly through the rev range, with vacuum lines refreshed and compression testing consistently high across all rotor faces. The chassis remains incredibly rigid, benefiting from the original double-wishbone suspension and a perfectly balanced 50:50 weight distribution. Power is delivered through a crisp 5-speed manual gearbox to a Torsen limited-slip differential, ensuring surgical precision in cornering. Finished in its factory-original paint with a flawless interior, this FD exhibits zero fluid seepage and remains mechanically stock, preserving the purity of its high-revving performance.
2020 model. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records included. One owner.
